zh.Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓
zh.Wraxall, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Lovel於大約1255年出生在英國時，她的父親John de Lovell II35歲，母親Maud Sydenham26歲。她於大約1269年與Sir Ralph Gorges在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年6月27日之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Wraxall, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Lovel于大约1255年出生在英国时，她的父亲John de Lovell II35岁，母亲Maud Sydenham26岁。她于大约1269年与Sir Ralph Gorges在英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年6月27日之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Lovel was born about 1255, in England, her father, John de Lovell II, was 35 and her mother, Maud Sydenham, was 26. She married Sir Ralph Gorges about 1269, in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 27 June 1297, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Lovel est née environ 1255, à Angleterre, son père, John de Lovell II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud Sydenham, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Gorges environ 1269, à Wraxall, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 27 juin 1297, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Lovel um 1255 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Lovell II 35 und ihre Mutter Maud Sydenham 26. Sie hat um 1269 in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph Gorges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 27. Juni 1297 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Lovel è nata il circa 1255 nel England, sua padre, John de Lovell II, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Maud Sydenham, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Gorges circa 1269, nel Wraxall, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 27 giugno 1297, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Lovelが約1255年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John de Lovell IIは35歳，母Maud Sydenhamは26歳であった。約1269年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウラクサルでSir Ralph Gorgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年6月27日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Lovel(이)가 대략 1255년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Lovell II(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Sydenham(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1269년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 라스알에서 Sir Ralph Gorges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 6월 27일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Lovel nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Lovell II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud Sydenham, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Gorges aproximadamente 1269, em Wraxall, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 27 de junho de 1297, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Lovel родилась около 1255 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John de Lovell II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Sydenham, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Gorges около 1269 г. в местности раксалл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 27 июнь 1297 г. в её родном городе.

sm.about 1255–after 27 June 1297: e tusa o le 1255–ina ua ma'ea le 27 Iuni 1297

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Lovel nació aproximadamente 1255, en Inglaterra, su papá, John de Lovell II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud Sydenham, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Gorges aproximadamente 1269, en Wraxall, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 27 de junio de 1297, en su pueblo.
